title: helianthus × multiflorus
intro: Helianthus × multiflorus, also known as Maximillian's sunflower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, due to its medicinal properties of containing sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Helianthus × multiflorus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and poultices, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
